# Duck Duck Mow

> Family-owned lawn care serving Herriman, Riverton, South Jordan, and Bluffdale, Utah. Weekly mowing, edging, trimming, blowing, and seasonal cleanups. Started by brothers in 2020. No contracts, free quotes.

## Core Information

- **Website:** https://duckduckmow.com
- **Phone:** 801-669-3819
- **Email:** info@duckduckmow.com
- **Location:** Herriman, UT 84096
- **Hours:** Seasonal — April through October

## Services

- [Lawn Mowing](/herriman-lawn-care) - Weekly and bi-monthly mowing, clean even cut every visit
- [Edging](/services/edging) - Crisp borders along all driveways, sidewalks, and beds
- [Trimming](/services/trimming) - Around obstacles, fence lines, and tight spots
- [Blowing](/services/lawn-blowing) - All hard surfaces cleared after every visit
- [Seasonal Cleanup](/services/seasonal-cleanup) - Spring and fall leaf removal, debris clearing, detail cleanup

## Service Areas

- [Herriman Lawn Care](/herriman-lawn-care) - ZIP 84096, our home base
- [Riverton Lawn Care](/riverton-lawn-care) - ZIP 84065
- [South Jordan Lawn Care](/south-jordan-lawn-care) - ZIP 84009
- [Bluffdale Lawn Care](/bluffdale-lawn-care) - ZIP 84065

## Pricing

- Weekly mowing starting at $35/visit
- Bi-monthly mowing starting at $45/visit
- Seasonal cleanup — custom quote based on yard size
- No contracts, no hidden fees
